title: Prove selected participant response path

implemented_surface.scope: no-live fake/injected control MEMBR evidence consumer
behavior: validate speaker_selected frame event.type, event.session_id, event.to, optional payload.member, selected_member, and participant_response.member
require runner adapter_kind == hermes-agent and terminal_event_type == participant_response
submit council.speak through injected DaemonClient command envelope after council.lifecycle probe
ack selected stream cursor with caller-supplied ack_command_id only after council.speak submit succeeds
return separate speak, ack, and proof evidence with live_readiness false

red_test_before_implementation.result: failed during collection because handle_selected_participant_response was not implemented

targeted_schema_entrypoint_smoke.command: uv run pytest tests/unit/test_selected_participant_response.py tests/unit/test_tool_schemas.py tests/unit/test_plugin_entrypoint.py tests/unit/test_bootstrap_smoke.py -q && make check-plugin-load-smoke

full_gate.command: make check-core-contract && make test-prepare && make test && git diff --check
full_gate.result: check-core-contract ok; test-prepare ok; unit 252 passed; integration 60 passed; e2e 13 passed; git diff --check exit 0

evidence_paths: Kanban task t_bc0ae375 Gray verdict summary in parent t_cb62fc9f metadata/color_verdicts.gray.blocking_findings
blockers: speaker_selected event.to was not enforced when payload.member was present
docs/tool-list traceability omitted kan_stream_ack and said nine tools
schema did not expose nested evidence contract clearly enough

evidence_paths: Kanban task t_cb62fc9f Blue local verification metadata

kas_lane_helper.residual_risk: payload.member remains optional when event.to binds selected member
evidence_paths: Kanban task t_df4ee98f Red verdict metadata preserved in parent t_cb62fc9f
Kanban task t_0b9156b9 Orange verdict metadata preserved in parent t_cb62fc9f

remaining_risks: This proof consumes caller/injected control MEMBR evidence; it does not itself invoke a real participant profile.

If stream ack compatibility or transport fails after successful council.speak submit, the speak may be durable while ack fails; current tests prove no ack after failed speak submit, not atomic all-or-nothing daemon semantics.
Actual real-profile isolated pilot remains approval-gated.
